landing.heroTitle: Ship your MVP in days, not months
landing.heroSubtitle: Production-ready template with Expo, Tamagui, auth, i18n, analytics, and Fastify backend. One codebase — deploy to App Store, Google Play, and Web.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything a modern app needs, already wired up and ready to customize.
landing.featureCrossPlatformDesc: Write once, deploy to App Store, Google Play & Web. Powered by Expo and React Native — one codebase for all platforms.
landing.featureThemingDesc: Beautiful design system with Tamagui. System-aware theme switching out of the box.
landing.featureI18nDesc: Internationalization ready with English, Russian, Spanish, and Japanese.
landing.featureAuthDesc: JWT auth with email/password and Google OAuth. Role-based access control included.
landing.featureBackendDesc: Fastify API with Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Nodemailer for email via any SMTP.
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: PostHog integration with session tracking, screen analytics, and admin dashboard.
landing.showcaseSubtitle: Beyond the basics — production-grade features baked in.
landing.showcaseItem1: Full-text search with PostgreSQL GIN index
landing.showcaseItem3: Animated tab bar & collapsible web sidebar
landing.showcaseItem4: Security: Helmet, CORS, Zod, rate limiting
landing.showcaseItem5: SEO: meta tags, OG cards, sitemap
landing.terminalSubtitle: From git clone to a running app — in under 5 minutes.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to build your next big thing?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Clone the repo and start shipping today. Free and open source.
landing.footerDesc: Production-ready MVP template for cross-platform apps with Expo and React Native.
